FAQ
Common questions
What is Tukka?
A platform that helps content reach more people through real distribution. We connect creators and brands with a network of authentic users who amplify content organically.
Who is it for?
Creators, brands, public figures, and crypto projects. Whether you're launching something new or growing an existing audience, Tukka gets your content the reach it deserves.
Is this spam?
No. Content is shared naturally by real users who opt in to distribute relevant content. Strict quality controls ensure every share feels authentic, never forced.
How do I join?
Join the waitlist to get early access. We onboard in waves so every user gets a premium experience from day one. Early members get priority access and founding rates.
When does Tukka launch?
We're targeting a public launch in Q2 2025. Waitlist members are the first to know and receive access before the general public.
